# Geek Life

> A bilingual (English/Russian) literary, self-ironic dev blog by Alex Kucherenko — short essays on
> software development with an IDE/terminal aesthetic. Statically generated; every article is
> available in both English (`/en/`) and Russian (`/ru/`), with untranslated posts falling back to
> English.

## Main pages

- [Home (EN)](https://geeklife.dev/en/): Latest posts dashboard
- [Home (RU)](https://geeklife.dev/ru/): Лента последних постов
- [Archive (EN)](https://geeklife.dev/en/archive/): All posts, grouped by month
- [Archive (RU)](https://geeklife.dev/ru/archive/): Архив всех постов, по месяцам
- [About (EN)](https://geeklife.dev/en/about/): Author profile
- [About (RU)](https://geeklife.dev/ru/about/): Об авторе

## Feeds & indexes

- [RSS feed](https://geeklife.dev/feed.xml): Recent articles (RSS 2.0)
- [Atom feed](https://geeklife.dev/atom.xml): Recent articles (Atom)
- [Sitemap](https://geeklife.dev/sitemap.xml): All pages

## Conventions

- Articles: `/{lang}/{slug}/` — e.g. `/en/hello-pipeline/`
- Tags: `/{lang}/tags/{tag}/` — e.g. `/en/tags/typescript/`
- Languages: `en` (default) and `ru`; bare paths redirect to the default language.
